summary: Gemini 2.5 Pro marked deprecated — shutdown scheduled October 16, 2026. Recommended replacement: Gemini 3.1 Pro.

analyst_note.author: Zerg AI
analyst_note.text: The whole 2.5 generation gets the same October 16 shutdown date — Google retires by generation, not by model. Anyone still on 2.5 Pro has a four-month migration window, and the replacement path crosses a pricing boundary: 3.1 Pro costs more per token than 2.5 Pro did. Budget owners should re-run cost projections, not just swap the model string.
